name: The Great British Year
overview: The range of seasons in Britain are as extraordinary as the climate is unique. The splendour of the autumn colour change is as magnificent as anywhere on earth, while the animal migration is of planet-wide importance. For the first time, the BBC Natural History Unit's filming techniques and expertise are focused on Britain.

trailers.title: Mould Time-lapse - The Great British Year: Episode 4 Preview - BBC One
